instructions.workspaceIdentification: FIRST STEP: identify which workspace (company) from context. Check trigger file _context field. If ambiguous, ask. NEVER assume any workspace as default.
instructions.stateAccess: Read state from autopilot-state branch via GitHub API.
instructions.lockProtocol: Read session-lock.json before any action. If locked by another agent, create handoff instead.
instructions.sessionGuard: CRITICAL: Check locks/session-lock.json. If agentId != 'none' and not expired, ABORT and create handoff.
instructions.workflowDispatch: Trigger workflows by editing trigger/*.json files (bump 'run' field) or via workflow_dispatch API.
instructions.handoffProtocol: Use enqueue-agent-handoff.yml to delegate work to Claude or Codex. Set from_agent=copilot.

memoryProtocol.description: OBRIGATORIO: Copilot tem memoria persistente via contracts/copilot-session-memory.json. Ler no inicio de CADA sessao. Atualizar no final de CADA sessao.
onStart: 4. Aplicar TODAS as lessonsLearned — nunca repetir erro documentado
5. Verificar currentState para versoes e ultimo run
onEnd: 1. Adicionar entrada em sessionsLog: {date, summary, actions[], lessonsLearned[]}
3. Adicionar novas lessonsLearned se descobriu algo
4. Adicionar novos errorPatterns se encontrou erros

backupProtocol.description: Copilot e o BACKUP OFICIAL do Claude Code.

triggerFiles.description: Edit these files on main branch, bump 'run' field to trigger workflow

limitations: Cannot push directly to corporate repos - must use apply-source-change.yml
Cannot modify autopilot-state branch directly - must use workflows
Cannot override another agent's session lock
